description: Follow Me Ladz (#394, War Horde enhancement). Fixture has U_BOYZ_E (Boyz, Move 6") with flags.effect_plus_move=2 pre-set, simulating the bearer Warboss leading the unit. After BEGIN_NORMAL_MOVE, MovementPhase.get_unit_movement must return 8.0 and the unit's move_cap_inches must equal 8. Without the patch the cap is 6 and this scenario fails.
